free_text: Systematic of fusion incompleteness in reactions
induced by alpha cluster projectiles
MANUU Polytechnic Darbhanga, Maulana Azad
National Urdu University, Hyderabad
Bareilly College, Bareilly
Addis Ababa University, Addis Ababa
UGC-DAE Consortium for Scientific Research,
Kolkata
K130 cyclotron
The 165Ho target of thickness ranged from 1.30 to
1.56 mg/cm2 interspersed with Al-degrader foils.
The thickness of Al-degrader foils was vary from 2.06
to 3.78 mg/cm2
The gamma-ray activities induced in each Al-
catcher foil were recorded by 60 cc HPGe detector
coupled to a PC based data acquisition system.
The resolution of the HPGe detector was found to be
2.5 keV for 1408 keV gamma-ray from the 152Eu source.
The beam was collimated to a spot of diameter
8 mm and the stack was irradiated with an average beam
current ~30 nA for ~11 hours.
Undetectable precursor contribution was subtracted by
PACE4 calculation.
Overall error (15%)
Fluctuation in beam current (<3%)
Thickness of the target foil (<3%)
Statistical uncertainty in geometry
dependent detector efficiency (<5%)
Dead time of the spectrometer (<10%)
Straggling of the ion beam (<2%)
